originalTitle: Microsoft delays Fable (again) to avoid GTA VI
summary: Microsoft has delayed its upcoming Fable reboot once again. The game was set to launch in autumn 2026, but Microsoft now says that Fable will come out in February 2027. However, it will show a "new look" at the game at its Xbox Games Showcase on June 7th. "​​This is year is packed with incredible […]
content: Microsoft has delayed its upcoming Fable reboot once again. The game was set to launch in autumn 2026, but Microsoft now says that Fable will come out in February 2027. However, it will show a “new look” at the game at its Xbox Games Showcase on June 7th. “​​This is year is packed with incredible games for XBOX players to enjoy, from Halo: Campaign Evolved, Gears of War: E-Day and Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 to Control Resonant, Star Wars: Galactic Racer and Grand Theft Auto VI,” Microsoft says on the Xbox account on X. “In order to plan our game launches through the holidays, in a way that works best for players, we’re moving Fable to February 2027 so it can have the dedicated moment it deserves. We’re excited to be giving players a major new look at Fable, as well as our broader lineup, at XBOX Games Showcase on June 7.” [Media: https://twitter.com/XBOX/status/2060398425686888546] The fall gaming season is already getting pretty full. Grand Theft Auto VI is scheduled for November 19th, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 was announced this week with an October 23rd release date, and Star Wars: Galactic Racer is set for October 6th. Presumably, Microsoft will share specific release dates for Halo: Campaign Evolved, Gears of War: E-Day, and other titles during the Xbox Games Showcase as well. Fable, developed by Playground Games, was first announced in 2020 as a “new beginning” for the series. Years later, Microsoft gave it a planned release window of 2025, but later pushed that to 2026. It’s set to come to Xbox Series X / S, PC, and PS5 when it is released. Microsoft also isn’t going to share news about Project Helix, the next-generation Xbox console, during the Xbox Games Showcase, Matt Booty, Xbox’s chief content officer, said in an episode of the Official Xbox Podcast released on Friday. Earlier this month, Microsoft promised that it would share more about Helix “later this year.”
chineseTitle: 微软再次推迟《神鬼寓言》的发布以避免 GTA VI
chineseSummary: 微软再次推迟了《神鬼寓言》的重启。该游戏原定于 2026 年秋季推出，但微软现在表示《神鬼寓言》将于 2027 年 2 月推出。不过，它将在 6 月 7 日的 Xbox 游戏展示会上展示该游戏的“新面貌”。 “今年充满了令人难以置信的[...]
chineseContent: 微软再次推迟了《神鬼寓言》的重启。该游戏原定于 2026 年秋季推出，但微软现在表示《神鬼寓言》将于 2027 年 2 月推出。不过，它将在 6 月 7 日的 Xbox 游戏展示会上展示该游戏的“新面貌”。微软在 X 上的 Xbox 帐户上表示：“今年充满了供 XBOX 玩家享受的精彩游戏，从《光环：战役进化》、《战争机器：E-Day》和《使命召唤：现代战争 4》到《控制共鸣》、《星球大战：银河赛车》和《侠盗猎车手 VI》。为了以最适合玩家的方式计划我们的游戏在假期期间发布，我们将《神鬼寓言》推迟到 2027 年 2 月，这样它就可以拥有专属的时刻我们很高兴能够在 6 月 7 日的 XBOX Games Showcase 上为玩家带来《神鬼寓言》以及更广泛的阵容的全新面貌。” [媒体：https://twitter.com/XBOX/status/2060398425686888546]秋季游戏季节已经相当充实。 《侠盗猎车手 VI》定于 11 月 19 日发售，《使命召唤：现代战争 4》于本周宣布，发售日期为 10 月 23 日，《星球大战：银河赛车》定于 10 月 6 日发售。据推测，微软还将在 Xbox 游戏展示会上分享 Halo: Campaign Evolved、Gears of War: E-Day 和其他游戏的具体发布日期。由 Playground Games 开发的《神鬼寓言》于 2020 年首次宣布，作为该系列的“新开始”。几年后，微软给了它一个计划的发布窗口是 2025 年，但后来又推迟到了 2026 年。发布时它将会登陆 Xbox Series X/S、PC 和 PS5。 Xbox 首席内容官马特·布蒂 (Matt Booty) 在官方 Xbox 播客的一集中表示，微软也不会在 Xbox 游戏展示期间分享有关下一代 Xbox 游戏机 Project Helix 的消息
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
